arts.ttl: I faced Marcus Rashford and Wilfried Zaha - one was better despite dressing room issues
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford has been compared to Wilfried Zaha as he appears to be calling time on his Manchester United career, with both having been accused of causing issues in the dressing room

arts.ttl: Marseille to sign Salzburg full-back Amar Dedic
arts.sum: Marseille have agreed to sign Red Bull Salzburg full-back Amar Dedic (22), according to a report from Foot Mercato. The Bosnia and Herzegovina international will arrive in Marseille this Sunday…

arts.ttl: Liverpool Transfer News: Mohamed Salah replacement Rayan Cherki agrees move - Fabrizio Romano
arts.sum: Rayan Cherki, the man prominently tipped to replace Mohamed Salah at Liverpool, has greenlit a transfer to Borussia Dortmund, according to Fabrizio Romano. He already wanted out in the summer, but no transfer materialised and he instead signed a one-year contract extension until 2026 to avoid a Salah situation.

arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund progressing in talks with Lyon’s Rayan Cherki as transfer deadline approaches
arts.sum: Fabrizio Romano reports that Borussia Dortmund are progressing in their pursuit of Lyon forward Rayan Cherki as the transfer deadline approaches. The 21-year-old has already given the initial green light over…

arts.ttl: Amine Harit is no longer part of Roberto De Zerbi’s plans

arts.ttl: Lyon’s Rayan Cherki gives green light to join Borussia Dortmund
arts.sum: According to a report from Fabrizio Romano, Borussia Dortmund are progressing in their efforts to secure Rayan Cherki (21) from Olympique Lyonnais. The Frenchman who won a silver medal with…

arts.ttl: ‘I’ve never played abroad’ – Valentin Rongier opens door to Marseille exit

arts.ttl: Official | Rennes sign Lilian Brassier on loan
arts.sum: Brest centre-back Lilian Brassier (25) has joined Rennes on loan, both clubs have announced. Brassier’s loan move includes a €12m option to make his move permanent until 2029. The French…
